title: selaginella pilifera
intro: Selaginella pilifera, also known as the spikemoss or prickly club moss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving respiratory function, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, Selaginella pilifera is often used in teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is believed to have potential applications in treating various health conditions, including cardiovascular disease and cancer.
